_comment: Seed registry for the Peregrine plugin marketplace. Copy this file to the root of the Knaox/peregrine-plugins GitHub repo (branch main) so that Peregrine panels fetching https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Knaox/peregrine-plugins/main/registry.json can discover available plugins.

plugins.name: Server Invitations
plugins.description: Invite users to your servers by email with granular Pelican permissions. Edit permissions of active subusers and pending invitations. Ships with Peregrine by default. Admin-aware — panel admins can manage invitations / subusers on any server. Other plugins can register their own permission groups via the shared PermissionRegistry singleton (e.g. egg-config-editor adds eggconfig.read / eggconfig.write).
plugins.author: Peregrine Team

plugins.name: Minecraft: Modpack - Installer
plugins.description: Install, update and remove Minecraft modpacks on a server in a few clicks. Aggregates Modrinth, CurseForge, ATLauncher, Feed The Beast, Technic and VoidsWrath. Auto-detects the required Java version after install and switches the server runtime accordingly. Single-step uninstall, search caching (1 h default, configurable), eligibility filter (admin picks allowed eggs), Filament admin at /admin/modpack-configs. Bundled with Peregrine 1.0.0-alpha.4+.
plugins.author: Peregrine Team

plugins.name: ARK:SE Mods Installer
plugins.description: Browse, install and uninstall Steam Workshop mods for ARK: Survival Evolved (appid 346110) directly from the server panel. Two-tab UI (Marketplace + Installed) with search, tag chips, sort, optimistic install/uninstall, bulk actions and a 5-layer cache (Redis SWR + cron warm + HTTP + single-flight lock) so Steam is rarely hit. Adds and removes mod IDs in a configurable Pelican egg variable (default MOD_ID, format `id1,id2,id3` — comma without space, matches the official ARK:SE egg parser). Admin picks allowed eggs, target variable, page route, page label, mods/page (25 or 50), Steam Web API key. Variable must be flagged user_editable on the Pelican egg.
plugins.author: Peregrine Team

plugins.name: ARK:ASA Mods Installer
plugins.description: Browse, install and uninstall CurseForge mods for ARK: Survival Ascended (gameId 83374) directly from the server panel. Two-tab UI (Marketplace + Installed) with search, dynamic category chips (pulled from CurseForge), 5-axis sort (Popularity / Top downloads / Recently updated / Most recent / Featured), optimistic install/uninstall, bulk actions and a 5-layer cache (Redis SWR + cron warm + HTTP + single-flight lock) so CurseForge is rarely hit. Adds and removes mod IDs in a configurable Pelican egg variable (default MOD_IDS, comma without spaces — matches the official ARK:ASA Pelican egg). Admin picks allowed eggs, target variable, format (comma / comma-space), page route, page label, mods/page (25 or 50), CurseForge API key. Variable must be flagged user_editable on the Pelican egg. CurseForge API key is free at https://console.curseforge.com/ — approval typically takes 24-48 h.
plugins.author: Peregrine Team
